mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE emergency_type = #{emergencyType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE emergency_type = #{emergencyType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_response WHERE response_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emergency_response ( response_id, emergency_type, status, title, description, location, reported_at, responded_at, resolved_at, reporter_name, reporter_dept, commander_name, commander_dept, casualties_count, damage_description, actions_taken, lessons_learned, drill_yn, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{responseId}, #{emergencyType}, #{status}, #{title}, #{description}, #{location}, #{reportedAt}, #{respondedAt}, #{resolvedAt}, #{reporterName}, #{reporterDept}, #{commanderName}, #{commanderDept}, #{casualtiesCount}, #{damageDescription}, #{actionsTaken}, #{lessonsLearned}, #{drillYn}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_emergency_response SET emergency_type = #{emergencyType}, status = #{status}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, location = #{location}, reported_at = #{reportedAt}, responded_at = #{respondedAt}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, reporter_name = #{reporterName}, reporter_dept = #{reporterDept}, commander_name = #{commanderName}, commander_dept = #{commanderDept}, casualties_count = #{casualtiesCount}, damage_description = #{damageDescription}, actions_taken = #{actionsTaken}, lessons_learned = #{lessonsLearned}, drill_yn = #{drillYn}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_emergency_response SET status = #{status}, responded_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RESPONDING' AND responded_at IS NULL THEN GETDATE() ELSE responded_at END, resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RESOLVED' THEN GETDATE() ELSE resolved_at END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_emergency_response SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
